jsonLd.title: Senior Revenue Manager at SpiceJet
jsonLd.description:
SpiceJet is actively seeking a talented and motivated Revenue Manager to join our dynamic team in Madurai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About SpiceJet:
SpiceJet is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SpiceJet!
